text: The majority of individuals joining beginner running groups have low baseline exercise levels.
population: sedentary adults joining beginner running groups

text: Approximately 75% of beginner runners who complete a structured group program achieve the goal of running 30 minutes continuously.
Self-efficacy, program adherence, and younger age are significant predictors of success in beginner running programs.
Beginner running group programs lead to significant improvements in mental wellbeing, self-efficacy, running identity, and reduced social physique anxiety.
population: sedentary adults joining beginner running groups

text: Beginner running group programs have a substantial dropout rate, with only 45% of participants completing follow-up assessments.
The typical beginner running group participant is female and in their early 40s.
